title: Abilty to add a quota for Integration actions
excerpt: This month we had a user who blew past our Integration actions for the month causing some problems for other users. We are addressing the issue with that user, but it would be super helpful if there was an ability to lim…

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: This month we had a user who blew past our Integration actions for the month causing some problems for other users. We are addressing the issue with that user, but it would be super helpful if there was an ability to limit or set a quota for an individual user to prevent overages for happening.
